use_cases: Hero section background with animated light particles moving across a grid pattern
Decorative animated background for SaaS and tech landing pages
Dark mode compatible canvas animation for product showcases
Responsive hero background for desktop and mobile platforms
ai_summary: An animated hero background component featuring light particles that traverse a minimalist grid pattern. Built with canvas and React hooks, it smoothly animates glowing lines horizontally and vertically across the grid with varying speeds and brightness. Dark mode compatible and responsive, making it ideal for SaaS, dev-tools, and tech product landing pages.
